name: CustomFormatInput
description: A specialized input component for custom number formatting (phone numbers, credit cards, etc.) using react-number-format.
usage_guidelines: Use for inputs requiring specific formatting patterns.
Implement format function to define display format.
Implement removeFormatting to extract raw value.
Use for phone numbers, credit cards, postal codes, etc.
Handle onValueChange for formatted value updates.

format.description: Function to format the input value for display.

removeFormatting.description: Function to remove formatting and extract raw value.

getCaretBoundary.description: Function to determine valid caret positions.

onValueChange.description: Callback fired when value changes with formatted and raw values.

styling_info.visual_description: An input field that automatically formats user input according to custom rules. Maintains cursor position during formatting.

Dont: Don't use for simple text inputs
Don't forget to extract raw values

Simple.title: Simple

WithForm.title: With Form
